items.question: Do I need to give you access to my Cloudflare® account?
items.answer: For the free Quick Scan, no. We analyze your domain externally using public data. For Starter and Pro plans, yes — you need to provide a Zone ID and API Token with read-only permissions. For Auto-Fix (coming soon), write permissions will be required.

items.question: Will the simulated attacks affect my site?
items.answer: No. Simulations run against Cloudflare® protections (WAF, Bot Management, DDoS Protection) — not against your origin server. Your site stays intact and running normally.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept Visa, Mastercard, and American Express credit and debit cards (domestic and international), as well as OXXO cash payments and SPEI bank transfers for Mexico.

items.question: Are the reports legally valid?
items.answer: Reports are advisory in nature and can be used as supplementary evidence in security audits. However, they do not replace a formal certified penetration testing audit.

items.question: How long does the analysis take?
items.answer: The Quick Scan takes less than 60 seconds. The Starter plan takes 2-3 minutes. The Pro plan can take 5-10 minutes depending on active protections.

items.question: Can I use credits across different services?
items.answer: Yes. Credits are universal: you can use them for reports, attack simulations, consulting sessions, and compliance add-ons. Credits never expire.

items.question: Is consulting in-person or remote?
items.answer: 100% remote. All sessions are via Google Meet. You can schedule from anywhere in the world through our online calendar.

cta.title: Secure your site today
cta.subtitle: Start with a free scan. No credit card. No commitments.
